name: In Murray UT, how long til my work injury claim settles?

mainEntity.name: In Murray UT, how long til my work injury claim settles?

acceptedAnswer.text: 3-12 months typical in Utah; faster without disputes.
acceptedAnswer.description: Utah workers' comp claims resolve in 3-12 months if straightforward, longer (1-2 years) with disputes or surgery; 80% settle pre-hearing. Factors like MMI delay[12]. Key factors: Quick reporting speeds process. Track approvals. Attorney negotiates faster.

description: 3-12 months typical in Utah; faster without disputes.
